title: 公众号干货列表头图
prompt_template: A WeChat official account header image for a listicle article, 16:9 horizontal format (1792x1024). Title at center: "{headline_text}" in bold sans-serif Chinese typography, dark gray (#1F1F2E). Below the title: a row of {item_count} small numbered circular badges (1, 2, ... {item_count}). Background: soft cream or light gray (#F7F7FA) with subtle geometric pattern. Left and right edges: minimalist decorative elements. Style: clean educational infographic, easy to scan, premium content creator aesthetic, 1792x1024.
